title: Opening for Category Manager at Amazon India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Amazon India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amazon India Digital Technologies:
Amazon India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Digital Technologies!
